redemption.ecosystemLabel: Adani One app (flights, hotels, trains, duty-free)

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank and Adani One product pages and third-party verified sources.
Joining fee and Annual fee Rs 5,000 each. Annual fee waived on spending Rs 6,00,000+ in the preceding membership year; EMI purchases excluded from spend count.
Welcome benefits: Rs 5,000 flight voucher + Rs 4,000 hotel/holiday vouchers on spending Rs 25,000 within 60 days of activation.
7% Adani Reward Points on Adani One ecosystem: flights, hotels, trains, buses, cabs, Adani-managed airports, Adani CNG, Adani electricity bills, Trainman.
2% on international spends, 1.5% on other domestic spends, 0.5% on utilities and insurance.
1 Adani Reward Point = Rs 1 (closed-loop currency). Points are redeemable ONLY on the Adani One app or portal — not transferable to airlines or hotel loyalty programs.
Redemption categories on Adani One app: flight bookings, hotel bookings, train/bus/cab bookings, duty-free shopping.
Domestic lounge: 4 complimentary visits per quarter via Visa Lounge Access; 16 per year total.
International lounge: 2 complimentary visits per year.
Pranaam services (Meet & Greet, porter, valet parking, car parking) available at Adani-managed airports.
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions up to Rs 4,000 at fuel outlets.
